word: G5220 - ὕπανδρος - hýpandros - hoop'-an-dros - Which hath an husband

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Which hath an husband
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5259 and G435; in subjection under a man, that is, a married woman: - which hath an husband.
